author: akudlay-ru
description: Export IMAP mail into analysis-ready Markdown digests and optional mail notes with adjacent attachments. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Andrey Kudlay
manifest.description: Export IMAP mail into analysis-ready Markdown digests and optional mail notes with adjacent attachments.
manifest.name: MailDump

name: MailDump

releases.author: Akudlay-ru
releases.description:
Release 0.1.10

- Schedule controls are now inside each preset.
- Supports daily, workday, selected weekday and interval schedule modes.
- Checks missed scheduled exports after Obsidian starts and asks before running them.
- Created drafts stay in the background instead of taking over the active pane.

releases.author: Akudlay-ru
releases.description:
MailDump 0.1.9

- Moved the main panel Drafts actions into the last tab, after Journal.
- Marked the file explorer draft action for Obsidian's file menu section.
- Updated community release assets.

Validation:
- node --check main.js
- node --check maildump-cli.js
releases.name: MailDump 0.1.9

releases.author: Akudlay-ru
releases.description:
## MailDump 0.1.2

- Added a configurable MailDump settings JSON path.
- Keeps the default settings file in the plugin folder, with optional external storage.
- When external storage is enabled, the plugin data file stores only the external settings path.

Also includes the multi-account workflow from 0.1.1: independent IMAP accounts, per-account child output folders, account-specific presets, and explicit mailbox check/save controls.
releases.name: MailDump 0.1.2

releases.author: Akudlay-ru
releases.description:
MailDump 0.0.6

Changes:
- Rebuilt the panel as a compact Obsidian-style side pane.
- Added a resizable preset list with a native resize handle.
- Restored a persistent current-process block at the bottom of the panel.
- Kept the Obsidian status bar integration.
- Fixed active preset outline clipping inside the scrollable preset list.

Validation:
- node --check main.js
- JSON parse for manifest.json and versions.json
- mojibake scan
releases.name: MailDump 0.0.6

releases.author: Akudlay-ru
releases.description:
# MailDump 0.0.1

First public architecture baseline for MailDump.

MailDump is a desktop-only Obsidian plugin for exporting IMAP mail into analysis-ready Markdown digests.

## Included

- IMAP mail export into Markdown digest
- Russian plugin interface
- English Obsidian commands
- Presets stored in Obsidian plugin data
- Preset import and export
- App-password handling modes
- Reply-chain cleanup
- Custom reply-chain marker
- Subject-based thread index
- Potentially unanswered incoming messages
- Optional message notes
- Optional adjacent attachment export

## Requirements

- Obsidian 1.5.0 or newer
- Desktop only
- IMAP account access
- App-password is recommended

## Release assets

This release must include:

- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css
releases.name: MailDump 0.0.1
